slots.caption_ig:
Pat's vs. Geno's? Neither, actually. Our top-5 cheesesteaks in Philly: John's Roast Pork, Dalessandro's, Steve's Prince of Steaks, Joe's, Cleavers. The famous corner doesn't even crack the top 10. Data > tradition.

#ForkFox #Cheesesteak #PhillyFood #PhillyEats #DishNotRestaurant
slots.caption_fb: The Pat's vs. Geno's debate is missing the actual top of the leaderboard. When you score Philly cheesesteaks by execution, ingredient quality, ratio, and value — John's Roast Pork, Dalessandro's, Steve's Prince, Joe's, and Cleavers outrank the famous corner. Sometimes the tourist version is just the most convenient version.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16, 10s. Top-5 ranked cheesesteak shops in Philly counted down. Each card shows shop name + neighborhood + score. End on John's Roast Pork at #1 with full scorecard. No music.
